selected_feature.title: TopDownLens Contract
selected_feature.summary: Dogfood-selected vertical slice proving the first TopDownLens contracts, topology, graph projection, BMAD handoff, and Salmon feedback loop.

source_context.reason: Records the dogfood chain from system thesis to selected feature.
Provides the product intent and acceptance boundary.
Defines the storage, topology, and schema decisions used by the dogfood run.
Anchors the selected feature to the top-down discovery capability.

include: Validate the TopDownLens identity hierarchy, derived graph, BMAD packet, topology, constitution layering, and Salmon feedback contracts.
exclude: Do not implement the full future TopDownLens runtime beyond the first contract and doctor-check slice.
guardrails: All durable references resolve by stable IDs, not mutable paths.
Implementation code remains in TargetProjects; control docs record feature artifacts and evidence.
Release-repo verification is deferred on this first run because nextlens-release is not present.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: A complete top-down walkthrough is recorded in dogfood/walkthrough.md.
The dogfood run produces exactly one selected feature and one BMAD packet.
Release verification skip is explicitly recorded with a Salmon signal.
